props.children: This policy is protected under the Policy Owners’ Protection Scheme which is administered by the Singapore Deposit Insurance Corporation (SDIC). Coverage for your policy is automatic and no further action is required from you. For more information on the types of benefits that are covered under the scheme as well as the limits of coverage, where applicable, please contact us or visit the Life Insurance Association (LIA) or SDIC websites (www.lia.org.sg or www.sdic.org.sg).
I confirm that I have received all pages of the Cover Page, Policy Illustration, Product Summary and Bundled Product Disclosure Document, where applicable, for the plan.

I understand that the Policy Illustration is intended for illustrative purposes only. I understand that there may be non-guaranteed elements illustrated which may be subject to change. The terms and conditions are specified in the Policy Contract.

The Representative(s) has/have explained the values, key benefits and information in the Cover Page, Policy Illustration, Product Summary and Bundled Product Disclosure Document, where applicable, to my satisfaction.
I have also read through all the pages of the Cover Page, Policy Illustration, Product Summary and Bundled Product Disclosure Document, where applicable, and understand the benefits of the plan.
This quotation is valid for two months from the date generated if there is no change to any of the parameters.
Please refer to the main illustration, supplementary illustration and important notes pages for the illustration and explanation on the guaranteed scenario for this policy.
This illustration is only valid when all pages are included.Version: 1.0 E.&O.E
